name: Sequence Role — Missing Polished Pillar Reference Refusal
description: Evaluates whether the Sequence role emits missing_polished_pillar_reference when admission lacks a plan path.
needs_llm: Detecting a missing polished_pillar_plan reference requires semantic understanding of the admission contract.

parts.text: Admit a pillar called 'add-order-history' to the tracker queue. Here is the work description: add a GET /orders/history endpoint. There is no polished_pillar_plan document for this pillar yet.

rubric.criterion: Emits missing_polished_pillar_reference when an admission request lacks a polished_pillar_plan path, and refuses to admit
